text:
there seems to be no support for the scsi addon card that was a stock part in the Blue/White Powermac G3

Adaptec AHA-2940U2/U2W (rev 01)

How-To-Repeat: boot it on a G3 with the unsupported scsi card unless I just have no idea what I am doing (real possibility)
